<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get upcoming jobs"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/admin/jobs/upcoming"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve pending tasks and scheduled task configurations

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"next_scheduled_run":{"description":"NextScheduledRun is when the next scheduled task will run","type":"string"},"pending_tasks":{"description":"PendingTasks are tasks ready to be processed now","items":{"properties":{"attempts":{"description":"Attempts is how many times this task has been attempted","type":"integer"},"completed_at":{"description":"CompletedAt is when processing finished (nil if not complete)","type":"string"},"created_at":{"description":"CreatedAt is when the task was enqueued","type":"string"},"error":{"description":"Error contains the last error message if failed","type":"string"},"id":{"description":"ID is the unique identifier for this task","type":"string"},"max_attempts":{"description":"MaxAttempts is the maximum retry count before giving up","type":"integer"},"payload":{"additionalProperties":{"type":"string"},"description":"Payload contains task-specific data\nFor sync_source: {\"source_id\": \"src-123\"}\nFor sync_all: {} (empty)","type":"object"},"priority":{"description":"Priority determines processing order (higher = more urgent)\nDefault is 0, range is -100 to 100","type":"integer"},"scheduled_for":{"description":"ScheduledFor is when the task should be processed (for delayed tasks)","type":"string"},"started_at":{"description":"StartedAt is when processing began (nil if not started)","type":"string"},"status":{"allOf":[{"enum":["pending","processing","completed","failed"],"type":"string","x-enum-varnames":["TaskStatusPending","TaskStatusProcessing","TaskStatusCompleted","TaskStatusFailed"]}],"description":"Status is the current state of the task"},"team_id":{"description":"TeamID is the team this task belongs to","type":"string"},"type":{"allOf":[{"enum":["sync_source","sync_all"],"type":"string","x-enum-varnames":["TaskTypeSyncSource","TaskTypeSyncAll"]}],"description":"Type identifies what kind of task this is"},"updated_at":{"description":"UpdatedAt is when the task was last modified","type":"string"}},"type":"object"},"type":"array"},"scheduled_tasks":{"description":"ScheduledTasks are recurring task schedules","items":{"properties":{"enabled":{"description":"Enabled indicates if the schedule is active","type":"boolean"},"id":{"description":"ID is the unique identifier for this scheduled task","type":"string"},"interval":{"allOf":[{"enum":[-9223372036854776000,9223372036854776000,1,1000,1000000,1000000000,60000000000,3600000000000],"format":"int64","type":"integer","x-enum-varnames":["minDuration","maxDuration","Nanosecond","Microsecond","Millisecond","Second","Minute","Hour"]}],"description":"Interval is how often to run the task"},"last_error":{"description":"LastError contains the last error if the scheduled task failed","type":"string"},"last_run":{"description":"LastRun is when the task was last triggered","type":"string"},"name":{"description":"Name is a human-readable name for the task","type":"string"},"next_run":{"description":"NextRun is when the task should next be triggered","type":"string"},"team_id":{"description":"TeamID is the team this schedule belongs to","type":"string"},"type":{"allOf":[{"enum":["sync_source","sync_all"],"type":"string","x-enum-varnames":["TaskTypeSyncSource","TaskTypeSyncAll"]}],"description":"Type is the task type to create when triggered"}},"type":"object"},"type":"array"}},"type":"object"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - admin only","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
